Test Title: Page H1 renders ""Settings""
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard/settings
2. Observe the page heading
Expected Result: H1 ""Settings"" is visible in Syne bold font

Test Title: Subtitle renders ""Manage your account preferences""
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard/settings
2. Observe text below H1
Expected Result: Subtitle ""Manage your account preferences"" is visible in text2 color

Test Title: Content is constrained to max-width 600px
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard/settings
2. Observe content area width
Expected Result: Settings content does not exceed 600px regardless of viewport width

Test Title: Profile card renders with white background border and border-radius
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard/settings
2. Observe the Profile section card
Expected Result: White card with 1px border and var(--radius) border-radius is visible

Test Title: Profile card H2 reads ""Profile""
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard/settings
2. Observe the first card heading
Expected Result: H2 ""Profile"" is visible in Syne bold font inside the first card

Test Title: Display Name label and input render inside Profile card
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard/settings
2. Observe the Profile form
Expected Result: Label ""Display Name"" (bold small) is shown above an editable text input

Test Title: Display Name input is pre-filled with the authenticated user's name
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a user with a known name
2. Navigate to /dashboard/settings
Expected Result: Display Name input contains ""Jane Smith"" on page load

Test Title: Display Name input is editable and reflects typed changes
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to /dashboard/settings
2. Clear the Display Name input
3. Type a new name
Expected Result: Input shows ""New Name"" as typed

Test Title: Email label and input render inside Profile card
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard/settings
2. Observe the Email field
Expected Result: Label ""Email"" (bold small) is shown above an input field

Test Title: Email input is pre-filled with the authenticated user's email
Test Steps: 1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard/settings
Expected Result: Email input shows the user's registered email address

Test Title: Email input is disabled and cannot be edited
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard/settings
2. Click the Email input and attempt to type
Expected Result: Email input has the disabled attribute; typed characters are not accepted

Test Title: Email input has a visually distinct disabled style
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard/settings
2. Observe the Email input styling
Expected Result: Email input has bg background color and text3 text color to indicate it is read-only

Test Title: Save Changes"" button renders with accent background and white text
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard/settings
2. Observe the submit button
Expected Result: Pill-shaped ""Save Changes"" button with accent background and white text is visible

Test Title: Clicking ""Save Changes"" does not navigate away from the page
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard/settings
2. Click "Save Changes"
Expected Result: URL stays at /dashboard/settings; form submission is handled via e.preventDefault()

Test Title: Save Changes"" button label changes to ""✓ Saved!"" immediately after submit
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard/settings
2. Click "Save Changes"
Expected Result: Button text changes to ""✓ Saved!"" immediately after the click

Test Title: ✓ Saved!"" label reverts to ""Save Changes"" after 2 seconds
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard/settings
2. Click "Save Changes"
3. Wait 2 seconds
Expected Result: After 2 seconds button text returns to ""Save Changes"" automatically

Test Title: Save Changes"" can be clicked again after the 2-second reset
Test Steps:
1. Click "Save Changes"
2. Wait 2 seconds
3. Click again
Expected Result: Button shows ""✓ Saved!"" again and resets after 2 seconds on each click

Test Title: Pressing Enter inside the form submits and triggers the saved state
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard/settings
2. Focus the Display Name input
3. Press Enter
Expected Result: ✓ Saved!"" feedback appears; page does not navigate away"

Test Title: Preferences card renders below the Profile card
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard/settings
2. Scroll below the Profile card
Expected Result: A second white card is visible with 1.25rem spacing below the Profile card

Test Title: Preferences card H2 reads ""Preferences""
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard/settings
2. Observe second card heading
Expected Result: H2 ""Preferences"" is visible in Syne bold font inside the second card

Test Title: Preferences card shows exactly 3 preference rows
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard/settings
2. Count rows in Preferences card
Expected Result: Exactly 3 preference rows are rendered: Email notifications / Show usage tips / Auto-save conversations

Test Title: Each preference row shows a checkbox label and description
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard/settings
2. Observe any preference row
Expected Result: Row contains: checkbox on the left + bold label text + smaller text3 description below the label

Test Title: Email notifications"" preference row renders with correct description
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard/settings
2. Observe the Email notifications row
Expected Result: Label: ""Email notifications""; description: ""Receive updates about new models and features""

Test Title: Show usage tips"" preference row renders with correct description
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard/settings
2. Observe the Show usage tips row
Expected Result: Label: ""Show usage tips""; description: ""Show contextual tips while using Chat Hub""

Test Title: Auto-save conversations"" preference row renders with correct description
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard/settings
2. Observe the Auto-save conversations row
Expected Result: Label: ""Auto-save conversations""; description: ""Automatically save all chat sessions""

Test Title: All 3 preference checkboxes are checked by default
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard/settings
2. Observe the checked state of all checkboxes
Expected Result: All three checkboxes render with defaultChecked=true; all appear checked on load

Test Title: Clicking a checked preference checkbox unchecks it
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard/settings
2. Click any checked preference checkbox
Expected Result: Checkbox becomes unchecked visually

Test Title: Clicking an unchecked preference checkbox re-checks it
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard/settings
2. Uncheck a preference
3. Click it again
Expected Result: Checkbox becomes checked again

Test Title: Preference checkboxes use accent color when checked
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard/settings
2. Observe any checked preference checkbox
Expected Result: Checkbox accent color matches var(--accent) (purple)

Test Title: Each preference row has a bottom border separating it from the next
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard/settings
2. Observe row separators
Expected Result: Each preference label element has a 1px var(--border) bottom border and 1rem bottom padding

Test Title: Clicking anywhere on a preference row label toggles the checkbox
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard/settings
2. Click on the label text of a preference (not directly on the checkbox)
Expected Result: Checkbox state toggles because the entire label element is clickable (cursor:pointer)

Test Title: Dashboard sidebar is visible alongside the Settings content
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard/settings
2. Observe page layout
Expected Result: 220px dashboard sidebar (with nav links and user info) is visible on the left side

Test Title: Settings"" sidebar nav item is active on this page
Test Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to /dashboard/settings
2. Observe sidebar nav
Expected Result: Settings item (⚙️) has accent color + bold + 3px left border + accent-lt background

Test Title: Unauthenticated access redirects to /auth/login
Test Steps:
1. Ensure no user is logged in
2. Navigate to /dashboard/settings
Expected Result: Browser redirects to /auth/login via the dashboard layout guard

Test Title: Display Name input falls back to empty string when user.name is undefined
Test Steps:
1. Log in with a user that has no name set
2. Navigate to /dashboard/settings
Expected Result: Display Name input renders as an empty field rather than showing ""undefined""

Test Title: Email input falls back to empty string when user.email is undefined
Test Steps:
1. Log in with a user that has no email set
2. Navigate to /dashboard/settings
Expected Result: Email input renders as an empty field rather than showing ""undefined""
